violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Multiple cases of food stored on floor of indoor walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Opens bags of sausage patties and eggs stated as mis-dated for 2/20. -C-Store multiple thawed and displayed in cold display are not dated from thaw date (i.e. parfaits, cream cheese desserts, uncrustables, etc.)

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Using cloth and foam shelf liner as non-slip mat at drain board.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue build up on kitchen Sani spray bottle. -Thermometers have build up of grease/flour residue. -Heavy dust/debris at all 4 fan covers throughout kitchen area. -C-Store has small spill in cupboard below beverage line.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at wall above dish pit. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Kitchen sani spray and C-Store sani bucket both found at greater than 400ppm Quat solution.
